title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a routed hybrid branch design after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Read connected, static, dynamic, default, and host routes and select the longest matching destination prefix.
Configure and evaluate static and default routes with next-hop reachability, recursion, failover, and documentation.
Compare BGP, EIGRP, and OSPF scope, neighbor behavior, path information, convergence, and use cases at N10-009 depth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for network routing that tests this competency: Use router or firewall subinterfaces with 802.1Q tags and gateway addresses for segmented routing.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
